instruction_hint: Focus on Grid properties and Intermediate complexity requirements.
example 1:
<style>
.layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-areas: "h h" "s m";
  grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr;
}
header { grid-area: h; }
aside { grid-area: s; }
main { grid-area: m; }
</style>
